cards.body: Most lip glosses sit on top of your lips. Lip Recharge actually gets to work—shea butter for a cushiony barrier, peptides to support collagen, vitamin E to smooth and soften. Skincare and makeup in one, the way it should be.
cards.title: Meet Lip Recharge
